title: Hancea longistyla
intro: Hancea longistyla is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects that can help alleviate various health issues such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Hancea longistyla contains bioactive constituents like flavonoids, alkaloids, and triterpenoids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine and is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, as well as being formulated into capsules and ointments for topical application.

The Euphorbiaceae family is commonly known as the spurge family due to its diverse range of plants.
